chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-119 of 2018 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For Katcha Peshi 22.02.2018. Mr. Syed Shafique Ahmed Shah, Advocate for petitioners alongwith petitioners. M/s Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, A.A.G and Syed Meeral Shah A.P.G alongwith SIP Ashique Ali Shah on behalf of SSP Matiari. Learned A.A.G has filed the comments of respondents No.2 and 3; taken on record; copies whereof have been supplied to the Counsel for the petitioners. Mr. Zeeshan Ali Memon, advocate, files vakalatnama on behalf of respondent No.4; taken on record. It appears from the record that petitioner No.1 has married with petitioner No.2 on 31.10.2017 and on the same date petitioner No.1 also executed an affidavit of freewill stating therein that nobody has kidnapped / abducted her and she wants to marry with man of her choice. Copies of such freewill affidavit and nikahnama are available on record at pages 11 and 13, respectively. It is stated by the Counsel for the petitioners that due to this un-ceremonial marriage, the private respondents are not happy with the marriage and they have already lodged an F.I.R. bearing Crime No.01/2018 under section 506/2, 504, 34 PPC at P.S Shahpur wherein petitioner No.2 has been nominated as an accused. Learned A.P.G. pointed out that petitioner No.2 namely Muhammad Hashim has already granted bail in the aforesaid crime. Through this petition the petitioners have sought protection of their lives and liberty. Learned AAG submits that official respondents would act strictly in accordance with law. In view of above, this petition is disposed of with direction to the official respondents to act strictly in accordance with law.

Learned AAG submits that official respondents would act strictly in accordance with law. In view of above, this petition is disposed of with direction to the official respondents to act strictly in accordance with law. However, the trial court in the aforesaid case is directed to decide the factum of the case on the basis of available material on record within the period of two months under the intimation to this court through Additional Registrar. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
